overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist traversing a post-apocalyptic landscape with distinctive red vegetation. The character moves through tall grass toward a massive mechanical Tallneck structure, with dead trees and mountain ruins visible in the misty background.

scene_state.functional_zone: open post-apocalyptic field with scattered dead trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the field navigating around dead trees and patches of red grass

entered.detail: charred dead tree trunks scattered throughout the landscape
distinctive tall red and pink grass patches swaying in the wind
misty mountains visible on the horizon under partly cloudy skies
narrow dirt trail winding through the grass and trees

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open post-apocalyptic field with scattered dead trees and patches of red grass. The terrain is uneven with a dirt path visible, and misty mountains loom in the distant background under a bright partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense red grass field approaching mechanical ruins

events.description: character crouches down to move stealthily through the tall red grass
large mechanical Tallneck structure becomes visible in the distance on the right

agents.ego_description: crouching low and moving stealthily through dense red grass toward the distant structure

entered.detail: massive giraffe-like mechanical walker with a circular head and long neck
large boulders and rocky terrain surrounding the Tallneck area

segments.scene_description: The character transitions to a crouch and moves through dense red tall grass. A massive mechanical Tallneck structure becomes visible on the right horizon, standing near rocky outcrops. The dead trees shift to the left as the character advances toward the machine.

scene_state.functional_zone: base of massive mechanical Tallneck structure

events.description: character reaches the base platform of the Tallneck with its support cables and wooden structures

agents.ego_description: carefully approaching the base of the dormant Tallneck mechanical structure

entered.detail: wooden and metal platform structure at the base of the Tallneck with support beams
thick cables connecting the Tallneck to its surrounding platform

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the base of the Tallneck, where the massive mechanical structure dominates the right side of the frame. The platform base with wooden supports and cables becomes visible, while the character continues crouching through the dense red grass. The sky becomes partially obscured by the towering machine.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an open post-apocalyptic field that gradually closes in as it approaches a towering mechanical structure. It begins with the character walking across uneven terrain marked by dirt paths, scattered dead trees, and patches of red grass under a bright, misty sky. As the character transitions to a crouch, the environment shifts into dense red tall grass, and a massive mechanical Tallneck emerges on the right horizon near rocky outcrops. The scene then narrows as the character advances, with the dead trees receding to the left while the towering machine begins to obscure the sky. Finally, the camera reaches the base of the Tallneck, revealing a platform of wooden supports and cables that dominates the frame as the character continues to move through the thick red vegetation.
